Localization.Description: Sliver PsExec module start from the C2 framework Sliver is detected

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Artifacts of service executable file name "{object.name}" indicate possible use of a Sliver PsExec payload on host {event_src.host}
Artifacts of service executable file name "{object.name}" indicate remote use of a Sliver PsExec payload from host {src.host} on host {event_src.host}
